[[inst_ucvtf]]
==== UCVTF

*Syntax:* ucvtf.{srcT2dstT} SrcL, ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* Integer-to-floating-point conversion: convert SrcL to floating-point, result to Rd/t/u.

*Encoding:*

image::../generated/encodings/enc_ucvtf.svg[UCVTF encoding,width=800]

*Uop-Class:* FSU

*Compression:* L32 (len=32)

*Uop-Class payload:* `{"note": "User: FP groups are FSU type and must be implemented", "source": "group_rule", "uop_kind": "FSU"}`
